notes: per_miner_tx_floor: 0 is intentional. Poisson block-time variance under different seeds can leave a miner at 0 txs created. The grep-pattern check + per-user floor are the load-bearing assertions for catching the wallets-die-after-3-txs regression.
all_nodes_within_height_range: max(final_node_heights) - min(final_node_heights) <= 2 across all 15 nodes.
wallets_funded_exact: 8 = 5 miners with can_receive_distributions: true + 3 users.
wall_time_seconds_max: 1080s (18 min) is generous over the canonical 14-15 min.
tx_in_blocks_ratio_min: ratio of tx_in_blocks / tx_created. The canonical was 137/168 = 0.815. Threshold of 0.80 leaves room for one or two extra tx-not-yet-mined.
